HGSS.599.0000:
Hi, I’m looking for this Pokémon.\f
If you have a KRABBY, would you
trade it for my VOLTORB? [0200,0000]
HGSS.599.0001:
Great! Thank you!\f
I finally got a KRABBY!
HGSS.599.0002:
You don’t have a KRABBY?
That’s too bad, then.
HGSS.599.0003:
You don’t have one either?\f
Gee, that’s really disappointing...
HGSS.599.0004:
Hi! The KRABBY you traded me is
doing great!
